The official NFT collection of "The Normal Mfer" animated series. 

Proceeds from the mint will go toward making a second season of the show.

news.title: Where we've been. Where we're headed. at Consensus yesterday.
The crew is locked in. Excited to co-sponsor the Vibeathon Time to ship

Good Vibes Club Vibeathon from May 15 to June 5  Citizens have been building things in Vibetown, and it felt right to give that energy a real moment with our first hackathon. You've got three weeks to bring whatever you've been thinking about to life. Open to everyone, Citizen or not. The team is cooking

more ways to build on @opensea. shipped a wave of 35 new api endpoints. go wild - unlocks new flows for devs building apps and agents docs.opensea.io/changelog/new- opensea is one of the most complete & performant crypto platforms in the world our goal is to bring ALL of the functionality of to developers for your agents, and projects to build ontop of  to who is championing developer & agent expe...

6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...

! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledger co-founder and former CEO admits that governments can subpoena access to your funds...

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
